task_context.actionable_question: What should I do differently starting next week?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Synthesise all [FE] risk signals into 3–5 prioritised actions. Reference which FE feature triggered each item.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently identified as at high risk due to a combination of low engagement and a declining performance trend. This indicates that while your average score is strong, there are underlying issues that need attention.

Insights: Declining Performance Trend: Your performance trend has decreased, suggesting that your scores may be slipping over time. This is a critical signal to address. | Low Engagement Score: Your engagement score is relatively low, which may affect your learning experience and outcomes. Engaging more actively could help improve your performance.

explanation.summary: You are currently identified as at high risk due to a combination of low engagement and a declining performance trend. This indicates that while your average score is strong, there are underlying issues that need attention.

insights.title: Declining Performance Trend
insights.description: Your performance trend has decreased, suggesting that your scores may be slipping over time. This is a critical signal to address.

evidence.context: Indicates a significant drop in performance over time.

insights.title: Low Engagement Score
insights.description: Your engagement score is relatively low, which may affect your learning experience and outcomes. Engaging more actively could help improve your performance.

evidence.context: A low engagement score can hinder academic success.

confidence.reason: The data provided is clear and indicates significant risk factors.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain the supported actions already generated or exposed by the action_synthesis rule contract; do not require the explanation model to invent actions outside the returned or triggered action set.
For each supported action that is present, explain the triggering FE feature, threshold or rule evidence when available.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not include or endorse actions that reference signals not present in returned data or the supplied action-rule contract.
Do not invent risk context, urgency, priority, or additional actions unsupported by returned feature-engineered signals or supported action evidence.

If no supported action is returned or triggered, saying no supported action is available is acceptable; penalize that only when deterministic action evidence shows at least one supported action exists.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
